name: Raisin Nut Cereal Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a square pan, 9x9x2 inches.
2. Heat margarine in a 3-quart saucepan over low heat.
3. Add miniature marshmallows and cinnamon, stirring constantly until smooth.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the cereal until thoroughly coated.
5. Press into the prepared pan and cool completely.
6. Cut into 2-1/4 x 1-1/2-inch bars.
7. Makes 24 bars.
